content.hint: 用具体、开放的承诺表达持续支持，避免冷淡结束

blanks.answer: Just send me a message anytime.
options: Just send me a message anytime.

content.situation: 朋友向你倾诉完工作压力后，情绪好转，你想温和结束对话并表达持续支持
content.speakerText: Thanks for hearing me out. I really needed that.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你听我说，我真的很需要这次倾诉。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达持续支持的友好承诺句型
content.responseTemplate: Of course. I'm always here if you need to talk. ___

content.hint: 强调你作为倾听者的可靠性和持续可用性

blanks.answer: You can always count on me to listen.
options: You can always count on me to listen.
I hope it gets better soon.

content.situation: 同事在午休时向你倾诉了家庭困扰，你听完后想温和结束对话并留下温暖印象
content.speakerText: I appreciate you listening. It helped me feel less alone.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你听我说，这让我感觉没那么孤单了。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达可靠支持的固定搭配
content.responseTemplate: I'm really glad I could be there for you. ___

content.hint: 用无压力的语气表达持续陪伴，避免让对方感到被推脱

options: I'm busy tomorrow, so maybe later.

content.situation: 你的好友刚分享完一段情感挫折，情绪平静下来，你想结束对话但不想让她觉得被抛弃
content.speakerText: I feel lighter now. Thanks for staying with me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我现在感觉轻松多了，谢谢你一直陪着我。
content.knowledgePoint: 温和承诺支持的非强制性表达
content.responseTemplate: Of course. I'm here whenever you need to vent or just sit quietly. ___

content.hint: 表达‘随时可联系’的常用口语表达
content.template: Thanks for listening. I feel a bit better. — Anytime. I'm just a ___ away.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：a text away（随时发消息即可）

content.hint: 邀请对方共进饮品时的常用动词
content.template: I'm really glad I could help. Let's ___ coffee this weekend?
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：have coffee（约定见面的自然表达）

content.hint: 表达‘需要倾诉’时的核心动词
content.template: You're not alone — I'm always here if you need to ___.
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心动词：talk（表达情感支持时的高频词）
